steps.title: Keep one main verb
steps.content: The main verb of the sentence is "analyzed": the researchers analyzed geotagged posts. The blank should introduce a modifying phrase that describes the researchers' purpose, not create another main verb.

steps.title: Use a participial modifier
steps.content: B, C, and D are finite verb phrases, so each would create a run-on structure with "analyzed." A present participle makes "looking for a relationship" a modifier of "researchers." The answer is A.
